metadata.description: Small, focused plugins for AI agent harness reliability — drift patterns, debugging discipline, adversarial verification.

plugins.name: drift-patterns
plugins.description: Catalog of 10 agent failure modes (drift patterns) and their structural harness countermeasures, loaded as an on-demand skill.

plugins.name: tool-channel-resilience
plugins.description: Discipline rules for surviving degraded tool-transport channels — small batches, background+poll, edit-then-verify, graceful checkpointing.

plugins.name: systematic-debugging
plugins.description: Root-cause-first debugging with agent-oriented extensions: 10-category cause taxonomy, STOP_FOR_HUMAN escalation, structured output, question reframing after 3 failed attempts.

plugins.name: knowledge-import
plugins.description: Turns external content into project artifacts only after source triangulation, deduplication, and validation gates pass. Distinguishes descriptive insights (extend docs) from normative standards (audit and fix real config/code).
